name: real-mcp-blind
note: Tool manifest drawn from the surfaces of real public MCP servers (@modelcontextprotocol/server-{filesystem,github,git,fetch}), namespaced server.tool. Gold queries are phrased the way a user would describe the task, NOT derived from any synonym table. Run BM25-only: NO synonyms in this fixture (so bm25 == bm25+expansion here) — this is the honest 'unknown products, no tuning' floor. Caveat: manifest + queries authored by the project (from public docs), not an independent third party; the anti-gaming properties that matter — real descriptions, intent-phrased queries, zero synonym tuning — hold.

tools.name: filesystem.read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system

tools.name: filesystem.read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read the contents of multiple files simultaneously

tools.name: filesystem.write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with content

tools.name: filesystem.edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file

tools.name: filesystem.create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists

tools.name: filesystem.list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a path

tools.name: filesystem.directory_tree
tools.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories as JSON

tools.name: filesystem.move_file
tools.description: Move or rename files and directories

tools.name: filesystem.search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern

tools.name: filesystem.get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata about a file or directory

tools.name: filesystem.list_allowed_directories
tools.description: List the directories the server is allowed to access

tools.name: github.create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a single file in a repository

tools.name: github.search_repositories
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories

tools.name: github.create_repository
tools.description: Create a new GitHub repository in your account

tools.name: github.get_file_contents
tools.description: Get the contents of a file or directory from a repository

tools.name: github.push_files
tools.description: Push multiple files to a repository in a single commit

tools.name: github.create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a repository

tools.name: github.create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request in a repository

tools.name: github.fork_repository
tools.description: Fork a repository to your account

tools.name: github.create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a repository

tools.name: github.list_commits
tools.description: Get list of commits of a branch in a repository

tools.name: github.list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a repository with filtering options

tools.name: github.update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue in a repository

tools.name: github.add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing issue

tools.name: github.search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories

tools.name: github.get_pull_request
tools.description: Get details of a specific pull request

tools.name: github.merge_pull_request
tools.description: Merge a pull request

tools.name: git.git_status
tools.description: Shows the working tree status

tools.name: git.git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Shows changes in the working directory not yet staged

tools.name: git.git_diff_staged
tools.description: Shows changes that are staged for commit

tools.name: git.git_commit
tools.description: Records changes to the repository

tools.name: git.git_add
tools.description: Adds file contents to the staging area

tools.name: git.git_reset
tools.description: Unstages all staged changes

tools.name: git.git_log
tools.description: Shows the commit logs

tools.name: git.git_create_branch
tools.description: Creates a new git branch

tools.name: git.git_checkout
tools.description: Switches branches

tools.name: git.git_show
tools.description: Shows the contents of a commit

tools.name: fetch.fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL from the internet and extract its contents as markdown

save text into a file, replacing what is there
tweak a few lines in a text file
what files are in this folder

how big is this file and when was it last changed

merge a pull request

start a brand new github repo
save my work to version control
stage my changes for the next commit
what have I changed but not staged yet
see the history of changes
switch to a different branch
start a new branch locally
which files have I modified
undo my staging
look at what a specific commit changed
grab a web page and turn it into text
